heroDescription:
The Smile You Deserve
With the Experience and
Care You Trust!
implantsDescription: Dental implants are titanium devices designed to replace the tooth root and support a prosthesis, thereby improving both aesthetics and chewing function. They are recommended for patients with single, partial, or complete tooth loss. We understand the importance of a complete smile for your self-esteem and quality of life. Our implants are designed to integrate seamlessly with your bone structure, ensuring comfort and functionality.
orthodonticsDescription: In modern dental medicine, technological advancements have revolutionized the way we treat crooked or misaligned teeth. One of the greatest breakthroughs has been the development of removable orthodontic treatments, commonly known as invisible or clear aligners. These revolutionary devices have gained popularity due to their effectiveness, convenience, and discretion compared to traditional braces. A perfect smile without having to give up smiling in photos..
veneersDescription: Porcelain and composite resin veneers are advanced aesthetic solutions to correct dental imperfections, providing a more harmonious smile.
whiteningDescription: Advanced procedures for a whiter and brighter smile.
bracesDescription: Modern technology for dental correction with comfort.
treatment_implantsDescription: Single implants and All-on-4 for your chewing comfort.
endodonticsDescription: Root canal treatment with advanced technology.
advancedTechnologyDescription: We use state-of-the-art equipment that allows us to perform highly precise and effective treatments.
specializedTeamDescription: Our team consists of highly qualified and experienced professionals.
humanizedCareDescription: Each patient receives personalized and welcoming treatment.
testimonialsSubtitle: Our greatest satisfaction is our patients' smiles

1.name: Isabel Curval
1.text: Dr. Kátia Fragoso is an excellent professional who applies her deep technical knowledge with extreme dedication to the patient. Throughout the procedure, she demonstrated great professionalism, was very perfectionist, and took great care of the patient's well-being. The confidence I felt in her hands was fundamental to making me feel relaxed and overcoming any obstacle. Now it's the ongoing process that will certainly have a result of excellence! Thank you and I recommend without any doubt.

2.name: Kelly Macedo
2.text: Excellent experience with Dr. Kátia Fragoso! I was attended with great attention, patience, and professionalism. The service was impeccable and I felt very safe throughout the process. Highly recommend for those looking for quality service!

3.name: Machete Pereira
3.text: I had my treatment with Dr. Kátia Fragoso and I can only say it was an excellent experience. She showed enormous professionalism, care, and attention to every detail. The result exceeded all my expectations, completely transformed my smile! Highly recommend to anyone looking for quality work and close, human service.

aboutDescription: With over 20 years of dedication to Dentistry, Dr. Kátia has built a professional journey based on a commitment to excellence. Rebuilding smiles is much more than just correcting dental issues—it is about restoring confidence and improving the quality of life for her patients. With extensive experience in general dentistry, her accuracy in diagnosis and treatment planning sets her apart. She is a specialist in Implantology from São Leopoldo Mandic College in Rio de Janeiro and in Dental Prosthetics, in addition to holding a postgraduate degree in Orthodontics. Dedicated to proactive prevention of oral health problems, her passion lies in delivering treatments combined with education on self-care for the community. Dental aesthetics, tissue regeneration using blood cell aggregates, and Invisible Aligners are also among the preferred specialties of this passionate professional.

heroText: Recover your smile and confidence with state-of-the-art dental implant treatments in the heart of Porto.
whyChooseSubtitle: Combining clinical excellence, advanced technology, and humanized care in Porto.
featureTechnologyDesc: CBCT and Intraoral Scanners for millimeter-precision surgical planning.
featureHumanizedDesc: Every treatment plan is unique. We listen to your goals and exceed your expectations.
featureSpecializedDesc: Clinical team dedicated exclusively to oral surgery and complex aesthetic rehabilitation.
ourSpaceDesc:
At Porto Implantes, we believe the environment is a fundamental part of the treatment.

We designed our clinic to be a haven of tranquility, far from the coldness of traditional offices. Modern, bright facilities equipped with state-of-the-art technology, designed to make your visit a relaxing and welcoming experience from the very first moment.
appointmentSubtitle: Schedule your assessment and take the first step towards the smile you've always desired. We are waiting for you.
errorMessage: Error sending message. Please try again.
implantHeroText: Restore chewing function and facial aesthetics with modern dentistry.
implantProblemText: If you suffer from total or partial tooth loss, the **All-on-4** technique represents the modern standard in global dentistry. At our Porto clinic, we offer customized solutions allowing for a full set of fixed teeth in just one day, restoring the quality of life you deserve.
implantConceptTitle: What is the All-on-4 and All-on-6 Concept?
implantConceptText1: The technique involves placing a fixed prosthesis on titanium implants. As the name implies, the treatment uses **4 strategically placed implants** to offer maximum stability, even in patients with low bone density.
implantConceptText2: Depending on clinical evaluation and the need for additional support, the procedure can also be performed as **All-on-6**, using six implants to ensure even more robustness, especially for larger arches or stronger bite forces.
implantMaterialsText: We understand each patient has different needs. We work with the three main materials on the market.
implantMatResinDesc: Affordable and common option. Metal internal structure with high-density resin finish.
implantMatZirconiaDesc: The "diamond" of dentistry. Biocompatible, extremely resistant, and superior aesthetics.
implantMatPorcelainDesc: The standard of excellence in naturalness. Each tooth is sculpted to mimic natural enamel.
implantBenefitsTitle: Benefits of Choosing Treatment in Porto
implantBen1Desc: In many cases, you leave surgery with temporary fixed teeth on the same day.
implantBen2Desc: Forget the discomfort and insecurity of slipping or hurting dentures.
implantBen3Desc: Implants stimulate the jawbone, preventing premature facial aging.
implantBen4Desc: Fully recover the taste of food and the strength to eat whatever you want.
implantStep1Text: We use advanced imaging (CT scan and intraoral scanners) to plan the exact position of each implant.
implantStep2Text: Safe procedure performed under local anesthesia or conscious sedation for your total comfort.
implantStep3Text: Installation of teeth that will transform your appearance and restore your smile.
implantFinalCtaTitle: Ready to transform your life in Porto?
implantFinalCtaText: Don't let tooth loss limit your happiness or health. Our team specializes in All-on-4 and All-on-6.
veneersHeroText: Transform the color, shape, and harmony of your teeth with high-precision veneers.
veneersDefinitionText: Veneers are ultra-thin custom "lenses" that adhere to the front surface of teeth. They are the ideal solution for correcting small imperfections, stains, or gaps, providing a naturally radiant smile.
veneersDefinitionHighlight: A minimally invasive treatment with immediate and transformative aesthetic results.
veneersPorcelainBen2: Shine and texture identical to natural teeth
veneersAdviceText: In your assessment, we will advise on the best option for your case and expectations.
veneersFinalCtaTitle: A new smile can change everything.
veneersFinalCtaText: Come design your smile with us. Digital technology and artistic vision at your disposal.
alignersHeroText: The most advanced technology to align your smile discreetly, comfortably, and effectively.
alignersIntroText: Forget wires and rubber bands. Invisible aligners are custom-made transparent trays that progressively correct the position of your teeth.
alignersIntroHighlight: Removable for eating and cleaning, offering freedom traditional braces don't allow.
alignersTimelineTitle: Your journey to a new smile
alignersStep2Desc: Visualize the final result before starting.
alignersBen1Desc: No one notices you're wearing braces.
alignersBen2Desc: Remove to eat and brush your teeth.
alignersBen5Desc: Visible results in a few weeks.
alignersFinalCtaTitle: Align your smile without changing your routine.
alignersFinalCtaText: The right technology for those seeking excellent results with maximum comfort.
whiteningHeroText: Restore the natural brightness of your smile with a safe, fast, and effective treatment.
whiteningIntroText: Teeth whitening is a non-invasive aesthetic procedure that lightens tooth color, removing stains and pigmentation accumulated over time (coffee, tea, tobacco, etc.).
whiteningIntroHighlight: We use advanced technologies ensuring enamel and gum protection, providing a natural and lasting result.
whiteningWhySubtitle: We prioritize your tooth health above all.
whiteningBen2Desc: Certified products that don't damage enamel.
whiteningBen3Desc: Eliminates tough stains and rejuvenates the smile.
whiteningFinalCtaText: Schedule your whitening today and see the difference.
preventionHeroText: The secret to a healthy and lasting smile starts with regular preventive care.
preventionIntroTitle:
More than treating,
we care for you.
preventionIntroText: Oral health is a fundamental pillar of your general health. Our oral hygiene appointments aren't just for "cleaning teeth", but for complete diagnosis and preventing future pathologies.
preventionIntroText2: Through advanced technology and rigorous protocols, we effectively, painlessly, and safely remove plaque, ensuring gum health and tooth integrity.
preventionIncludesSubtitle: A complete hygiene and diagnostic protocol.
preventionItem1Desc: Effective removal of tartar and plaque with total comfort.
preventionItem2Desc: Removal of surface stains (coffee, tea, tobacco) for a brighter smile.
preventionItem3Desc: Complete evaluation of cavities, gum health, and oral cancer screening.
preventionFinalCtaSubtitle: Prevention is the best investment you can make for your health.
cardImplantDesc: Complete oral rehabilitation with state-of-the-art dental implants.
cardVeneersDesc: Transform your smile aesthetics with high-durability porcelain.
cardAlignersDesc: Discreet and comfortable dental correction for an aligned smile.

chat.greetingPrincipal: Hello! 👋 I'm Porto Implantes' virtual assistant.
chat.greetingName: Nice to meet you, {{name}}! 😊 How can I help you today?

treatments.prompt: Excellent! Which treatment would you like to know more about?

implants.title: Dental Implants
implants.text: Implants replace the tooth root and support a prosthesis. Recommended for those who have lost one or more teeth, restoring function and aesthetics naturally.

veneers.title: Dental Veneers
veneers.text: Thin porcelain or resin shells applied over teeth. They correct color, shape, and size, providing a harmonious and bright smile.

aligners.title: Invisible Aligners
aligners.text: Transparent and removable devices to align teeth discreetly. They offer more comfort and aesthetics than traditional braces.

whitening.title: Whitening
whitening.text: Safe procedure to whiten teeth, removing stains and yellowing, ensuring a younger and brighter smile.

prevention.title: Prevention and Cleaning
prevention.text: Oral health maintenance with professional cleaning, scaling, and complete check-up to avoid future problems.
